title: What Transit Depth Reveals
script_summary: Transit depth offers vital clues about exoplanets and their sizes.

segments.voiceover: The dimming of a star holds a secret about its planets.
When a planet transits—crosses in front of its star—it causes a temporary dip in brightness.
But how much it dims reveals the planet's size compared to the star.
A larger planet blocks more light, creating a deeper transit signal.
This method helps astronomers estimate sizes without ever visiting those distant worlds.
Curious about more cosmic mysteries? Like and follow for more insights!
